title: delphinium cyphoplectrum subsp. stenophyllum
intro: Delphinium cyphoplectrum subsp. stenophyllum, also known as a variety of delphinium, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Delphinium cyphoplectrum subsp. stenophyllum include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
